body:
This PR adds assertions when constructing operators, to ensure that boundary conditions passed to those operators are supported. ~We could make these inner constructors~ I made them inner constructors, so that users are strictly unable to use incorrect boundary conditions for each operator.

This addresses the contructor-side checks for #52. Next, we should check before executing these broadcast expressions that the keys in the BCs match the space's `boundary_names`.

Testing that any BCs are given must be done right before execution, since the need for BCs in any particular operator depends on if and how they are composed.

This PR also updates / adds some documentation.
title: Add FD operator checks for allowable boundary conditions

body: This PR bumps the patch version for a new release.
title: Bump patch + update news for new release
